name: Couscous Stuffed Eggplant
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the couscous by covering with twice as much boiling water and letting stand for 10 to 15 minutes.
2. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
3. Cut the stems off the eggplants and cut each in half lengthwise. Remove the pulp, leaving about a 1/2-inch shell.
4. Dice the pulp.
5. Heat olive oil plus 2 tablespoons water in a skillet. When hot, add eggplant and garlic and sauté, covered, until the eggplant is tender. Stir occasionally.
6. Add scallions and tomatoes and cook until they have softened slightly.
7. Add the remaining ingredients, including the couscous. Remove from heat.
8. Fill each eggplant shell with the skillet mixture. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes.
